Discover the natural wonders of the Great Lakes as we commemorate 250 years of our nation’s history. This extraordinary journey across vast freshwater seas and tranquil shores begins the moment you step aboard our modern fleet of small coastal ships. With fewer than 130 guests on board, you’ll explore welcoming port cities, rich Indigenous traditions, and the pioneering spirit that helped shape a nation.
